Description: Array of filters applied to the panel. Accepts KQL/Lucene expression filters, filter groups, or raw Elasticsearch DSL filters.
If true, ignore global filters when fetching data for this layer. Default is false.

Array of metrics to display as columns in the datatable. Items: `countMetricOperation`, `uniqueCountMetricOperation`, `minMaxAvgMedianStdDevMetricOperation`, `sumMetricOperation`, `lastValueOperation`, `percentileOperation`, `percentileRanksOperation`, `differencesOperation`, `movingAverageOperation`, `cumulativeSumOperation`, `counterRateOperation`, `formulaOperation`.
Enables pagination and sets the number of rows to display per page. Possible values: `10`, `20`, `30`, `50`, `100`.
Not used with ES|QL data sources.
Array of operations to split the datatable rows by. Items: `dateHistogramOperation`, `termsOperation`, `histogramOperation`, `rangesOperation`, `filtersOperation`.
Sampling factor between 0 (no sampling) and 1 (full sampling). Default is 1.
Sorting configuration. Only one column can be sorted at a time. Use "column_type" to specify the column type.
Array of operations to split the metric columns by. Items: `dateHistogramOperation`, `termsOperation`, `histogramOperation`, `rangesOperation`, `filtersOperation`.
